items.claim: Caio Borralho has poor cardio in the later rounds of a fight.
items.quote: Brahalo looks [ __ ] dog [ __ ] tired rounds three through five.

items.claim: Dione Barbosa has a full training camp for this fight.
items.quote: Barbosa has always had this fight. Full fight camp.

items.claim: Anna Arluk is taking this fight on 12 days' notice.
items.quote: Anna stepped in on 12 days notice.

items.claim: Anna Arluk retreats immediately when hit with a significant strike.
items.quote: when you tag her with a big shot, she backs up immediately.

items.claim: Dione Barbosa's grappling is her greatest strength.
items.quote: that's Dion Barbosa's best strength in my opinion is her grappling.

items.claim: Anna Arluk has significant deficiencies in her grappling game.
items.quote: she definitely has huge holes in her grappling.

items.claim: Anna Arluk's record is inflated by beating low-quality opponents.
items.quote: all the people that Anna is beating are people that are uh they have losing records or they're losing to people that have losing records

items.claim: RJ Harris is a taller fighter with a reach advantage over Alvin Hines.
items.quote: he's the taller fighter... clear height and reach advantage.

items.claim: Alvin Hines struggles to close the distance against shorter opponents.
items.quote: Alvin can't even close distance on someone who's a shorter opponent
